mte_summary: Remove ability to add rows in Buyer Work Queue requisitions table (MDR-1071)

test_cases.summary: Functional: Verify BWQ table does not allow adding new rows

description.scenario: User attempts to add a new requisition row in the Buyer Work Queue (BPMS002.1) that is not already in the system.
description.expected_result: The 'Add Row' button is disabled or missing, and no new row can be created in the BWQ requisitions table.

steps.action: Open Bizagi and navigate to the Buyer Work Queue (BPMS002.1) session.
Locate the requisitions table within the BPMS002.1 case.
steps.expected_result: Requisitions table displayed with existing approved PRQs.

steps.action: Attempt to click the 'Add Row' button or equivalent action to insert a new requisition line.
steps.expected_result: Action is blocked; button is disabled or click has no effect.

steps.action: Verify that no new row appears in the table and the system prevents manual entry of non-existent requisitions.
steps.expected_result: Table remains unchanged; no new row added.
